rule_metadata.author: frack113
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious Extrac32 Alternate Data Stream Execution

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Extrac32 Alternate Data Stream Execution
id: 4b13db67-0c45-40f1-aba8-66a1a7198a1e
status: test
description: Extract data from cab file and hide it in an alternate data stream
references:
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Extrac32/
author: frack113
date: 2021-11-26
modified: 2022-12-30
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1564.004
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - extrac32.exe
    - .cab
    CommandLine|re: :[^\\]
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
